rows.cycle_goal_summary: Inspect nearby shared storage (chest) and nearby work/station blocks; then decide next build/gather step based on verified container and crafting-table presence.
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully executed inspectSharedChest. The runtime postcondition for inspectSharedChest passed, indicating the nearest shared chest/container was inspected and a snapshot was recorded for use in later deposit decisions.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Gather nearby logs and assess your inventory, then prepare to deposit essentials into the inspected shared chest next (without depositing until inventory delta is known).
rows.what_happened: Jun executed the cycle action_skill collectLogs (with an observe pre-step and a wait after). The collectLogs action_skill postcondition passed, indicating the runtime confirmed a non-empty inventory change consistent with spruce_log/log collection.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Deposit verified spruce logs into the already-inspected shared chest (shared-chest-1) if the deposit action succeeds; otherwise, refresh evidence on chest access and pivot to next needed practical step.
rows.what_happened: Jun attempted the depositSharedItems action (to deposit spruce logs into shared-chest-1) after observing, but the required chest inspection step timed out (inspect_chest: timeout). The action-skill postcondition failed because shared-storage contribution could not be verified.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Re-run observe + inspect the nearest shared chest (shared-chest-1) using fresh runtime evidence, then (if accessible) deposit spruce_log x2 into shared storage with transfer verification.
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully re-ran observe + inspected the nearest shared chest (shared-chest-1). The inspect_chest action passed with a fresh container snapshot; no deposit into shared storage was executed this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Deposit spruce_log x2 into shared-chest-1 with verified container-transfer evidence.
rows.what_happened: Jun executed depositSharedItems for spruce_log x2: performed observe, inspected shared-chest-1, ran deposit_shared, then waited. The action-skill postcondition passed with verifier_status=passed and evidence refs for observe/inspect/deposit/wait.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Inspect nearby crafting table/chest opportunities and decide the safest next starter-shelter step with evidence (then remember missing evidence if neither is actionable).
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully ran inspectSharedChest (with observe + wait), producing a verified shared-chest snapshot for shared-chest-1.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Move to the nearby crafting_table (if accessible) and perform an evidence refresh; if it can’t be used, remember the blocker and pivot to shelter-enabling material gathering.
rows.what_happened: Jun attempted an evidence-refresh of crafting_table usability via run_mineflayer_program, but the program failed with a skill_error due to a runtime exception: "undefined is not an object (evaluating 'bot.findBlock')". No crafting-table interaction (window open/closed) was verified this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify crafting_table usability directly, then record the exact runtime interaction result to unblock starter-shelter crafting decisions.
rows.what_happened: Jun (npc_b) executed only a move_to action and arrived at the bounded scouting waypoint. No crafting_table interaction (window opening / interaction failure reason) was attempted or recorded this cycle; the crafting-station usability evidence goal remained unverified.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Get within exact interaction range of the nearby crafting_table and attempt a direct crafting-table interaction to produce fresh runtime evidence (success or structured failure reason).
rows.what_happened: Jun attempted to run placeCraftingTable by calling place_block for a crafting_table at a target cell near (3,78,9), but the tool returned blocked because place_block requires a crafting_table in inventory. No crafting_table world placement (and no subsequent direct interaction/opened UI evidence) was produced this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify crafting-table interaction evidence directly (inventory/nearby-block evidence → attempt interaction → record outcome).
rows.what_happened: Jun recorded a remember-only cycle note: crafting-table interaction cannot be evidenced this turn because Jun has no crafting_table item in inventory and there is no observed/interactable nearby crafting_table block in the available loaded evidence.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Gather enough spruce log(s) to craft a crafting_table, place it in the world, then attempt direct interaction to obtain crafting UI evidence.
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully executed collectLogs after an observe refresh, indicating reachable spruce logs were collected this cycle; no crafting-table placement or interaction evidence was produced yet.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Refresh nearby world-block evidence and then attempt a direct crafting-table interaction (without using run_mineflayer_program); if no crafting_table is interactable/visible, record the structured interaction failure reason tied to the actual loaded target.
rows.what_happened: Jun only ran a fresh `observe` at position (2.3,74,9.3). The nearby block evidence shows only spruce logs/leaves plus grass_block and dirt within the scanned/loaded nearby set. No crafting_table block was observed, and no interaction attempt with a crafting station occurred this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Attempt to craft a crafting_table item from currently available materials, then verify inventory change (avoid any generated helper path that previously crashed).
rows.what_happened: Jun ran a fresh observe, then attempted the craftCraftingTable action. The craft_item step was blocked with the reason: “No craftable inventory recipe found for crafting_table.” The action skill failed verifier_status=failed, so no crafting_table item-in-inventory evidence was produced and no crafting-station placement/interaction occurred.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Craft required intermediates (planks/sticks) from the observed spruce_log, then retry crafting_table into inventory using deterministic craft_item (avoid run_mineflayer_program).
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully ran craftPlanksAndSticks (via craft_item) from the observed spruce_log and the action skill verifier passed. No crafting_table in inventory was evidenced/claimed in this cycle; the work focused only on producing required intermediates.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Retry crafting the crafting_table inventory item using deterministic inventory-grid crafting now that spruce_planks are present; verify via inventory delta evidence.
rows.what_happened: Jun re-attempted the crafting_table inventory-crafting step using craftCraftingTable, and the runtime verifier passed. The action_skill postcondition indicates the craft_item output evidence for crafting_table was successfully produced/verified.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Place the carried crafting_table into the world at a nearby valid support/empty cell, then verify interaction (e.g., crafting UI opens or interaction succeeds) to close the 'crafting_table known_or_placed' evidence gap.
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully executed place_block to place a crafting_table world block. The runtime tool_status for place_block is "placed", and the last_tool_result shows afterBlockName changed from air to crafting_table at the resolved support/placement location (targetPosition requested y=74 but resolved at y=75 via surface_position_above_requested_target). Inventory delta indicates crafting_table item was consumed (inventoryDelta:-1).

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify crafting_table usability by moving into an explicit adjacent position and attempting direct interaction to open the crafting UI (or record structured failure).
rows.what_happened: Jun attempted to move_to an explicit adjacent position (x=3,y=75,z=9) for crafting_table interaction, but pathfinder stopped early; the actor ended at approximately (x=3.7,y=72,z=10.47). The required station-interaction attempt did not occur, so crafting_table usability (UI open) was not verified this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Move to an explicit reachable adjacent position of the placed crafting_table (x=3,y=75,z=8) and directly interact to verify the crafting UI opens (or record the structured failure reason).
rows.what_happened: Jun executed move_to toward an intended adjacent position to the placed crafting_table at (3,75,8), but the pathfinder stopped before reaching the target and no crafting-table interaction was attempted this cycle.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Move to an explicit adjacent reachable cell to the placed crafting_table at (3,75,8) and attempt direct interaction to verify usability (crafting UI opens) or record a structured failure reason.
rows.what_happened: Jun’s move_to toward the explicit adjacent cell (3,75,7) near the placed crafting_table at (3,75,8) did not reach the intended target; the pathfinder stopped before completion and no crafting_table interaction was attempted this cycle. The move_to tool itself returned status=moved, but the target position was not achieved and no postcondition about station usability was produced.
